---
title: "mucosome_ids"
format: html
---

# Setup
```{r}

librarian::shelf(tidyverse, dbplyr, here, RPostgres, DBI, RIBBiTR-BII/ribbitrrr)

# connect to database
dbcon = hopToDB("ribbitr")

# table pointers
db_bd = tbl(dbcon, Id("survey_data", "bd_qpcr_results"))
db_sample = tbl(dbcon, Id("survey_data", "sample"))
db_capture = tbl(dbcon, Id("survey_data", "capture"))
db_survey = tbl(dbcon, Id("survey_data", "survey"))
db_visit = tbl(dbcon, Id("survey_data", "visit"))
db_site = tbl(dbcon, Id("survey_data", "site"))
db_region = tbl(dbcon, Id("survey_data", "region"))
db_country = tbl(dbcon, Id("survey_data", "country"))
db_env = tbl(dbcon, Id("survey_data", "environmental"))

ddir = Sys.getenv("data_dir")

nina_pa_samples = read_csv(here(ddir, "mucosome", "Mucosome_samples_PA.csv")) %>%
  mutate(sample_name = recode_values(MucosomeID,
                                    "2022-05-18‚Äêadmin-rapi16" ~ "2022-05-18-admin-rapi16",
                                    "2022-05-8-admin-raca3" ~ "2022-05-18-admin-raca3",
                                    "2022-05‚Äê18-admin-raca1" ~ "2022-05-18-admin-raca1",
                                    "2022-08-15-admin-rapi3" ~ "2022-05-19-admin-rapi3",
                                    "2022-08-19-admin-rapi2" ~ "2022-05-19-admin-rapi3",
                                    default = MucosomeID
))

```

# data query
```{r}

# query mucosome of interest
q_pa_mucosome = db_sample %>%
  left_join(db_capture, by = "capture_id") %>%
  left_join(db_survey, by = "survey_id") %>%
  left_join(db_visit, by = "visit_id") %>%
  left_join(db_site, by = "site_id") %>%
  left_join(db_region, by = "region_id") %>%
  left_join(db_country, by = "country_id") %>%
  filter(sample_type == "mucosome") %>%
  filter(region == "pennsylvania",
         date >= "2022-01-01") %>%
  select(sample_id,
         sample_name, 
         capture_id,
         taxon_capture,
         life_stage,
         sex,
         svl_mm,
         body_mass_g,
         body_temp_c,
         visit_id,
         date,
         site,
         region,
         country)

# collect and align with nina data
pa_mucosome = q_pa_mucosome %>%
  collect() %>%
  full_join(nina_pa_samples %>%
              select(sample_name,
                     MucosomeID) %>%
              mutate(in_nina_data = TRUE), by = "sample_name") %>%
  mutate(in_nina_data = if_else(is.na(in_nina_data), FALSE, in_nina_data),
         in_ribbitr_data = !is.na(sample_id)) %>%
  rename(sample_name_mucosome = sample_name) %>%
  arrange(sample_name_mucosome) %>%
  select(sample_name_mucosome,
         MucosomeID,
         in_ribbitr_data,
         in_nina_data,
         everything(),
         sample_id,
         capture_id,
         visit_id)

# query associated bd samples
q_pa_muc_bd = db_bd %>%
  inner_join(db_sample, by = "sample_id") %>%
  filter(capture_id %in% pa_mucosome$capture_id)

# collect bd
pa_muc_bd = q_pa_muc_bd %>%
  select(sample_name_bd,
         bd_detected,
         bd_its1_copies_per_swab,
         capture_id) %>%
  collect()

# query associated env samples
q_pa_muc_env = db_env %>%
  left_join(db_survey, by = "survey_id") %>%
  left_join(db_visit, by = "visit_id") %>%
  filter(visit_id %in% pa_mucosome$visit_id)

# collect_env
pa_muc_env = q_pa_muc_env %>%
  group_by(visit_id) %>%
  slice_min(water_time, n = 1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(visit_id,
         air_temp_c,
         wind_speed_m_s,
         water_temp_c,
         p_h,
         tds_ppm,
         conductivity_us_cm) %>%
  collect()

# join mucosome, bd & env
pa_mucosome_bd_env = pa_mucosome %>%
  left_join(pa_muc_bd, by = "capture_id") %>%
  left_join(pa_muc_env, by = "visit_id")

# check maligned samples
micheck = pa_mucosome %>%
  filter(!in_nina_data | !in_ribbitr_data)

# save to file
write_csv(pa_mucosome_bd_env, here("staging", paste0("mucosome_bd_env_pa_", today(), ".csv")))

```
